calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-18-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Nancy J. Newman, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
9:17am
Cause called for small claims appeal. No appearance by appellant Copart Auto Auctions. Boris Etalis, previously sworn, appears as respondent in Pro Per. Mr. Etalis testifies in the narrative. Evidence is reviewed but not admitted.
9:25am
Matter submitted. Judgment is entered. Motion to dismiss (filed on 1/17/06) based on improper venue is denied.
